Normally fetching $999 these days since Bluetti permanently cut MSRPs across the board to better align with market rates, we’ve mostly seen this bundle keeping between $999 and $899 since it launched in January, with some earlier 2026 falls to the $749 low (last seen in early March). Now, with our exclusive savings code, you’re getting a combined $241 markdown off the going rate for the second-lowest price we have tracked – just $9 above the low. items.title: DriftGuard Update Offers Fix For Stick Drift In Xbox Controllers
items.summary:
Those who game using an analogue controller are probably no strangers to stick drift. While typically an issue plaguing older equipment, there have been instances of sticks drifting after just days of use. Usually, this is a problem that requires some hardware tweaks.
